title: **💰 Putrec'z Big Loot Khest**
description: Da greedy ork guardz yer stash or choppz yer hand if ya steal.

dropdown.config_bonus_description: Set coinz for da new gitz

donation_custom_message: Uze da 'Custom Amount' option in da Canvas to give a custom amount!

beggar.title: 🪙 **PUTREC'Z BEGGIN'** 🪙
beggar.description:
Putre begs gold for clan projects, give gold regular and Putre'll tank ya every week.
 If yer lucky ya might get sumfin' back.
beggar.instructions:
- Click give in da menu below.
 - Wait fer da weekly results at da end.
 - Join in wiv any amount and Putre'll remember it.
beggar.no_donations: No givin' yet. Be da first to chip in!
beggar.beggar_donation_success: Tankz fer givin' {amount} gold fer da cause: {reason}! 🪙

dropdown.beggar_donate_description: Make a donation fer clan projects
